case_title: ANAS ZAHIR VS. JOHN DOE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAHIR, ANAS AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JOHN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-02-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-25-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-17-2003
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SARA LERSCHEN. (212)
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-03-2003 CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-05-2003 CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-02-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2003 CONTINUED TO SEP-03-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-03-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST BRIAN L. LARSEN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-03-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-19-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY JOANN PRIOR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES AND COSTS
